_schema: Each entry: name (hackathon name), organizer (company or school running it), date (Month Year), location (City, Country or Online), what (one sentence: what you built), stack (array of tech tags), link (URL to project or devpost, or null).

entries.name: SIX Hackathon
entries.what: Built RELAY (Jacob) in 48h: an AI assistant that records an employee's screen, uses a VLM to reconstruct their workflows frame by frame, and compiles the output into a living knowledge handbook that powers a role-agnostic onboarding chatbot.
